title: hieracium glandulistipes
intro: Hieracium glandulistipes, also known as the glandular hawk's beard or yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving joint pain, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium glandulistipes is often used as a tincture or tea, and it may also be found in combination with other herbs in supplements or infusions.
